reviewer: Internal visual review for prototype dataset audit
methodology: All 345 deterministic samples were reviewed on 22 original-detail contact sheets. Crop identity, health-state mapping, unsupported/OOD handling, and gross image quality were checked; disease subtype labels were retained from source metadata because the MVP predicts only crop plus healthy/disease/invalid.

f1a17f6cbebd922381a3c318.notes: Contact-sheet sample #046 is severely defocused; corrected from maize healthy to explicit blur/OOD.
